input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8771 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: If generated tests execute a full Maven lifecycle instead of focused component or --version-style coverage, they may touch user settings and the local Maven repository; such tests should isolate temporary directories in test code rather than requiring driver-level setup.
Constructor signatures for ArtifactResolutionException and ArtifactNotFoundException differ in 2.0.7, so generated tests must use the resolved 2.0.7 APIs.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is needed: maven-core 2.0.7 resolves its Maven/Plexus/ClassWorlds/Wagon dependencies transitively, and the artifact contains its Plexus descriptors and bundled pom.properties needed by existing meaningful component/CLI-version coverage. The reported failure is generated test code using outdated maven-artifact constructor signatures, not missing setup.
